archived_by: PM (qc-consolidated verdict: Approve after W-1 targeted re-review)

residual_findings.title: LocalDbError::ConstraintViolation overloading leaks DAO internals + collapses distinct failure classes on the PATCH public surface
residual_findings.source: qc1 W-1 + qc2 W-1 (converging); qc3 S-1 cross-reference; raised in wave-1 (2026-06-17) qc-consolidated.md
residual_findings.closure_note: V1.49 P0 W-1 fix wave (commit 7da35dd5, merged at c4b4500f): DAO-level split — IllegalTransition { from, to } + InvalidEnum { field, value, allowed } added alongside retained ConstraintViolation (other callers in works.rs / inspiration_items.rs / create-path validators / handlers/works.rs). Handler remaps: IllegalTransition→INVALID_TRANSITION (422), InvalidEnum→INVALID_INPUT (422), with structured messages (no 'findings' table-name leak) and tracing::warn! on both arms. Renamed test findings_lifecycle_rejects_unknown_status_value→findings_lifecycle_rejects_unknown_status_with_invalid_input. Added 2 new tests: findings_lifecycle_distinguishes_invalid_transition_from_invalid_enum (4 cases) + findings_lifecycle_rejects_sql_injection_style_status (qc2 S-2 rolled). 50 hermetic tests pass. Targeted re-review: qc-specialist Approve @ 1a3a3646; qc-specialist-2 Approve @ fcf6cf95.
residual_findings.closure_evidence: iteration/v1.49 @ c4b4500f (merge) + 7da35dd5 (fix commit) + 1a3a3646 (qc1 re-review) + fcf6cf95 (qc2 re-review); qc-consolidated.md re-review Approve verdict
